_comment: The 48 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA World Cup (hosts USA/Canada/Mexico + 45 qualified). Qualification complete as of 2026-06-03; tournament starts 2026-06-11. The jfjelstul dataset ends at 2022, so this is the only forward-looking input. Names use the dataset's English nation names (post-successor) so the build can join on them directly; the 4 debutants have no dataset history and are added with appearances:0.
_comment_debutants: Qualified nations with NO prior World Cup finals appearance. Added to nations.json with appearances:0 and every stage 'Nunca'. Their counter anchors to first appearance = 2026 (handled in the UI layer).
